items.text:
Aliens are green.
But when they are in a meditative state,
their antennae are blue.
There is a meditation session in progress on the first floor of an architecture firm.

Jane is watching the union
representatives and says:
"None of the union representatives' antennae will..."

The virus needs to be diagnosed as soon as possible.
If treatment is not administered, the aliens' antennae become spotted for a whole month.
Meryl is observing her secretaries and says:

will..."

items.text:
The alien children like to flash lasers to annoy their friends on the playground.
They can use different colors, which vary in how annoying they are.
Mitchell is annoying.
If Mitchell annoys a friend today,
and does so like this,
he's going to get a detention.

qwen_content.text:

he's going to get a detention.

items.text:
The alien children work hard to be able
to control the color of their lasers.
Each time they achieve a new color,
they get a diploma and move on to the
next level.
Tegan has a laser exam today.
If she successfully blasts her laser,
and does so like this,
she'll pass the exam.
